pr.title: Fix gmtitle to match, mark as matching, ninja apply
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2223 made focused gmtitle matching changes: it refactored one title-screen condition into a small helper, changed gmtitle.c from Equivalent to Matching in configure.py, and adjusted GALE01 symbol metadata for gmtitle-related local strings, floats, and BSS ranges. The bot report recorded linked-code and data improvements plus two new matches for main/melee/gm/gmtitle .bss and .sdata2.

key_files.role: Code matching refactor for title-screen animated background setup; adds isActiveTitle() helper and changes fn_801A1498_inline from static inline to static.
Marks melee/gm/gmtitle.c as Matching instead of Equivalent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk at MatchingFor object list

key_files.role: Updates gmtitle-related symbol metadata: converts many address-style/global string and float entries to local @ labels, adds local labels, and splits gmTitle_80479B28 BSS into smaller symbols.

what_changed.text: Added static inline bool isActiveTitle() encapsulating the previous condition involving gm_801A4310(), MJ_TITLE, MJ_OPENING_MV, gm_801A42C4(), and MN_VS.
Replaced the local var_r0 boolean assignment ladder in fn_801A1498_inline with if (isActiveTitle() != 0).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gm/gmtitle.c removed var_r0 conditional block and added helper call

what_changed.text: Changed fn_801A1498_inline declaration from static inline void to static void.
Changed configure.py classification for Object("melee/gm/gmtitle.c") from Equivalent to Matching.
Converted several gmtitle-associated data symbols from global/address-style names to local @ labels across .rodata, .data, .sdata, and .sdata2, and added local labels such as ...data.0 and ...bss.0.
Split gmTitle_80479B28 BSS metadata from a single 0xA0 global object into a 0x10 global object plus local 0x10 and 0x80 symbols at gmTitle_80479B38 and gmTitle_80479B48.
Bot report recorded linked code +3936 bytes, matched data +192 bytes, linked data +584 bytes, and two new matches for main/melee/gm/gmtitle .bss and .sdata2.

smart_moves.text: Separated a repeated mode-check condition into a named helper instead of keeping the decompiler-shaped temporary boolean block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gm/gmtitle.c isActiveTitle() and var_r0 removal

smart_moves.text: Updated configure.py status only after the PR title and bot report indicate matching progress for gmtitle.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new gmtitle matches

smart_moves.text: Used symbol metadata changes rather than C-side dummy storage to account for local labels and split BSS ownership.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt local @ labels and BSS split

decomp_lessons.lesson: For small matching fixes, a helper that names a condition can replace a generated temporary-boolean ladder when the resulting source still matches.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: isActiveTitle() added and var_r0 block removed

decomp_lessons.lesson: When data ownership is the issue, symbol metadata edits such as local @ labels, local labels, and BSS splits may be part of a matching PR rather than adding fake source-level globals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt local label and BSS split hunks
text_corpus: bot report records .bss and .sdata2 new matches

naming_conventions.name: isActiveTitle
naming_conventions.lesson: The helper name describes the local title-state predicate introduced by the PR; no broader naming convention is proven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gm/gmtitle.c added static inline bool isActiveTitle()

naming_conventions.lesson: The PR converts multiple gmtitle-related strings/floats from address-style or gmTitle_* global symbols to local @ labels in symbols.txt.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inline-helper extraction plus non-inline caller adjustment
assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: The PR introduced static inline bool isActiveTitle() and changed fn_801A1498_inline from static inline to static, replacing a local boolean branch shape with a helper call condition.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR slice does not include objdiff output for the exact function; support comes from the title, configure.py marking, and bot progress report.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: The PR localized several string and float symbols and added local section labels to improve data matching for gmtitle.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report .bss and .sdata2 new matches
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The slice does not explain each individual symbol's ownership beyond the metadata diff.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: The PR split gmTitle_80479B28 from a 0xA0 global BSS object into smaller global/local ranges, with bot evidence that gmtitle .bss reached 100%.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No source comment or reviewer explanation is present for the semantic meaning of the split ranges.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata and changed file counts
raw_diff: complete diff for 3 changed files
text_corpus: empty PR body and decomp-dev[bot] report
notes: The raw diff is complete and clearly identifies all changed files and edits.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The bot report supports progress and two new data matches, but the slice does not include narrow objdiff output for the changed C function.
No reviewer intent or detailed rationale for individual symbol metadata changes is available.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Small predicate helper can replace generated boolean ladder for matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2223, gmtitle matching introduced isActiveTitle() for a mode predicate and replaced a local var_r0 boolean ladder with if (isActiveTitle() != 0), alongside a configure.py move from Equivalent to Matching and bot-reported progress.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use symbol metadata for local data ownership during matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2223 improved gmtitle matching partly by converting many gmtitle-related data symbols to local @ labels and splitting a BSS range in symbols.txt, with bot evidence that gmtitle .bss and .sdata2 reached 100%.

source_update_candidates.title: gmtitle.c marked Matching in PR 2223
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2223 changed configure.py so Object("melee/gm/gmtitle.c") moved from Equivalent to Matching.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a path/status fact candidate, not a decomp lesson; curator should verify against current source before updating path facts.

source_update_candidates.title: gmtitle symbol metadata localized and BSS split
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2223 changed config/GALE01/symbols.txt for gmtitle-related data: several strings/floats became local @ labels, local labels were added, and gmTitle_80479B28 was split into smaller global/local BSS ranges.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source/path metadata record; individual ownership should be verified against current symbols and map data before promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that every gmtitle address-style symbol should be renamed to a local @ label; the PR only shows specific addresses.
Do not treat the helper name isActiveTitle as a global naming standard; it is only evidenced as a local helper in this PR.
Do not claim human review approval rationale; no human review comments are present in the loaded slice.
Do not claim exact function-level objdiff success from the slice; only configure.py status and bot progress report are loaded.
